title: Sprayable lipid-based lubricated hydrogel coating for alleviating catheter-related mucosal damage and pain.
snippet: Medical catheters are essential for clinical diagnosis and therapy, yet their insertion and retention inevitably cause mucosal damage and pain. Conventional catheters compromise comfort and risk secondary inflammation, underscoring the need for advanced catheter surface coatings. Herein, we developed a sprayable lipid-based lubricated hydrogel coating (Oxy@...
